TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == He-ma Ťć∑ť¶¨ == He-ma, nakamuan u sumamaday nu Si-la a ngaliwnguay nu micudaday a tademaw, pilecuhan i Ya-si-ya , mamenu', natangahan nida u Se-se "Yi-li-ya-te'" atu "Aw-de-say", nina tusaay pulung han pangangan "He-mi-se-se", ayda inai' ku simie tu sakay ci He-maan a nikaidawan nida, sisa idaw ku sananay ci nidaan u tengil nu sasakamuen mahida u nisangaan a tademaw. namakayda tu "He-ma-se-se" katuuday nu syece saan u tawyaay nikaydaaan nu pinaay a seci namaka laway nu nipakatineng a nicudadan a nisaicelangan. Ťć∑ť¶¨, . nikaudip atu nakamuan ÁĒüŚĻ≥ŚŹäŚā≥Ť™™ inai' tu ku sulitan ni He-lan, sisa yadah ku sasakamuen ci nidaan, nika inai' naming ku tatenaay. nipilecuhan atu dimiad caay katinengi, nisulitan tu demiadan caay tu ka tinengi. sakay nikaudip nida, sulit nu Ku-si-la sye-cia ci Si-luo-duo-de saan tu nikaudip ni He-ma itida i nikaudip nida a zitayan nu nuayawan caay pilakuuyt tu sepat a lasubu nu mihcaan, hakiya mikiayaw tu kunyen walu a lasubu lima a bataan nu mihcaan. uyniyan a nakamuan, idaw ku sananay ci He-maan a ziday caay pibatad tu Te'-luo-yi nikalepacawan, hakiya mikiayaw tu kunyen sabaw tusa a secian. ni He-ma a zitayan hakiya u kunyen nu ayawan a cacay nu bataan a secian. pilecuhan ni He-ma, idaw ku caayay kalecad nu nakamuan. naidaw ku pituay nu kitidaan atu cense masasualaw tu ci He-maan a kinlian. sayadahay a nakamuan namakayda i Yi-aw-ni-ya, daysa nida a cudad yadah ku namaka Yi-aw-ni-ya a nakamuan. . Ku-si-la tademaw sakay ci He-ma nicudadan palSi-la lalanagawan a sakapahay nu He-ma palabinacadan a kasenengan, nika ci Tin-ken saan ci He-maan u " misulitay a tapang". nika i sabaw tu pitu hedek a secian, hamaw sa pabaliw idaw haw kina ci He-ma a tademawsa, atu pilecuhan, nikaudipan, nicudadan nidaay hakiya sisangaan nida idaw ku caayay kalecad nu niadihan, mala " He-ma nu wendayan". ". i sumamad yadah ku liwan tu namaka ci He-maan a nisulitan, nika mahicaay kiya ku labu, ahican miadih. He-ma a nikaudipan hakiya i kun-yen nu ayawan tu sabaw tusa a secian katukuh i kunyun nuayawan tu pitu a secian, nipilecuhan nida a diyadu'an, niliwanan nu sumamad han tusa a sasulitan, masakamutu pituay a niyadu'an, hakiya nakamuan tu luma' nida itini tu i putuay nu niyadu'an. sipakayda i cudadan nu laculan atu nakamuan nu picidekan, ci He-ma hakiya u Siw-ya-si-ya nutipanay a Yi-aw-ni-ya tademaw, sadikuday kapatayan i Ay-cin-hay a Yi-aw-se-daw. idaw ku musakamuay nu sumamaday a misulitay nu tademawan namaka Pa-pi-lun dakepan ci He-ma pataydan i Si-la sa, ci " He-ma" itida i Si-la nasulitan pal " sapatawid tu tademaw" han ku nipikaysiaku. duma satu, ci He-ma u tatayna sa, hakiya ci " He-ma" u masakaputay nu misulitay a nganganan sa. tunikamenuan ni He-ma, cacay nu sumamaday nu mituktukay a tademaw, sakatusa nu sumamaday a Si-la tademaw palutatengan tu nikamenu'an, makaybalucu a makaadih tu tuuda aca a kakatinengan. ŚŹ¶Ś§Ė, . nikaaalawan tina cudadan, namaka sabaw tu pitu a secian, micuyi tu kina katuuday nu tademawan, tademaw namaka cudad malingatu tu masasualaw tu. tatengan nikaaalawan tina cudadan namaka sabaw tu walu a seci nikuda, caypic walwal mihcaan kaadihan a " Yi-li-ya-ta'" wi-ni-se nalimaan a nisulitan a nisangaan tu He-ma a nisulitan mala katuuday nu tademawan a nikaaalawan, misuayaw tu dadadiwan nu natangahan a nipikinkiwan tada maaalawtu ka pihaceng. . nu paylumalumaan a niadihan malatulu, sipakayda i De-kuo syece ci Wuo-e-hu dayhu a " apuyuay dadiw nakamuan" saan nikalingatu nina cuda sipakayda i kunyen nu ayawan sabaw tulu a seci katukuh i kunyen siwa a seci nu ayawan, caay namin kalecad ku misulitay a natangahan, u nakamuan sa anikalaylayan, nisakapahan tu nisulitan, madayumay ni He-ma, u Yi-ta-li sye-ce ci Cen-pa-di-se-ta.Wi-ke u dayhu a " palecad nu nakamuan" saan ci He-ma micukaymas tu sumamaday nu tademawan a nilacula natangahan misanga tu sapalecad a dadadiwan, "makaybalucuan a nakamuan" sakay nina tusaay a nidatengan malatusa tu ku nabalucuan, saan ninatusaay a cudadan malanuayawan ni He-ma natangaah nisulitan tu tusaay a sakacaay kalecad a nisulitan, sipakayda tu tawan anipisilemedan, haymaw sa malatanayuay a cudadan. sisa ninacuda idaw ku sapalecad a nisangaan, idaw ku mahicaay kiya. . Amilika a syece ci Mi-e-man. Pa-li sakamusa ci He-ma cudadan u mahiniay nu dadiwen midangay nu dadaydayan, satabakiay a siwmian u He-ma cuda idaw ku sananay tu " He-ma-se-taw-yi". sakay midangay mudadiway a sitangahay nu tademawan, idaw namin ku mahidaay a sasakamuen, sasapulungan a kapahay, nu katahekalan migiki. ci He-ma cudad yadah ku masahicaay a kitidaan, tatengan u kapahay nu kakaydihan. .
S.PHON: == ńß…ô-ma ** == ńß…ô-ma, nakamuan u sumamadaj nu si-r~…ĺa a Ňčar~…ĺiwŇčuaj nu mi ¶udadaj a tad…ômaw, pir~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan i ja-si-ja , mam…ônu Ē~ °, nataŇčańßan nida u s…ô-s…ô "ji-r~…ĺi-ja-t…ô Ē~ °" atu "aw-d…ô-saj", nina tusaaj pur~…ĺuŇč ńßan paŇčaŇčan "ńß…ô-mi-s…ô-s…ô", ajda inai Ē~ ° ku simi…ô tu sakaj ¶i ńß…ô-maan a nikaidawan nida, sisa idaw ku sananaj ¶i nidaan u t…ôŇčir~…ĺ nu sasakamu…ôn mańßida u nisaŇčaan a tad…ômaw. namakajda tu "ńß…ô-ma-s…ô-s…ô" katuudaj nu sj…ô ¶…ô saan u tawjaaj nikajdaaan nu pinaaj a s…ô ¶i namaka r~…ĺawaj nu nipakatin…ôŇč a ni ¶udadan a nisai ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇčan. **, . nikaudip atu nakamuan ***** inai Ē~ ° tu ku sur~…ĺitan ni ńß…ô-r~…ĺan, sisa jadańß ku sasakamu…ôn ¶i nidaan, nika inai Ē~ ° namiŇč ku tat…ônaaj. nipir~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan atu dimiad ¶aaj katin…ôŇči, nisur~…ĺitan tu d…ômiadan ¶aaj tu ka tin…ôŇči. sakaj nikaudip nida, sur~…ĺit nu ku-si-r~…ĺa sj…ô- ¶ia ¶i si-r~…ĺuo-duo-d…ô saan tu nikaudip ni ńß…ô-ma itida i nikaudip nida a zitajan nu nuajawan ¶aaj pir~…ĺakuujt tu s…ôpat a r~…ĺasubu nu mińß ¶aan, ńßakija mikiajaw tu kunj…ôn war~…ĺu a r~…ĺasubu r~…ĺima a bataan nu mińß ¶aan. ujnijan a nakamuan, idaw ku sananaj ¶i ńß…ô-maan a zidaj ¶aaj pibatad tu t…ô Ē~ °-r~…ĺuo-ji nikar~…ĺ…ôpa ¶awan, ńßakija mikiajaw tu kunj…ôn sabaw tusa a s…ô ¶ian. ni ńß…ô-ma a zitajan ńßakija u kunj…ôn nu ajawan a ¶a ¶aj nu bataan a s…ô ¶ian. pir~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan ni ńß…ô-ma, idaw ku ¶aajaj kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad nu nakamuan. naidaw ku pituaj nu kitidaan atu ¶…ôns…ô masasuar~…ĺaw tu ¶i ńß…ô-maan a kinr~…ĺian. sajadańßaj a nakamuan namakajda i ji-aw-ni-ja, dajsa nida a ¶udad jadańß ku namaka ji-aw-ni-ja a nakamuan. . ku-si-r~…ĺa tad…ômaw sakaj ¶i ńß…ô-ma ni ¶udadan par~…ĺsi-r~…ĺa r~…ĺar~…ĺanagawan a sakapańßaj nu ńß…ô-ma par~…ĺabina ¶adan a kas…ôn…ôŇčan, nika ¶i tin-k…ôn saan ¶i ńß…ô-maan u " misur~…ĺitaj a tapaŇč". nika i sabaw tu pitu ńß…ôd…ôk a s…ô ¶ian, ńßamaw sa pabar~…ĺiw idaw ńßaw kina ¶i ńß…ô-ma a tad…ômawsa, atu pir~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan, nikaudipan, ni ¶udadan nidaaj ńßakija sisaŇčaan nida idaw ku ¶aajaj kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad nu niadińßan, mar~…ĺa " ńß…ô-ma nu w…ôndajan". ". i sumamad jadańß ku r~…ĺiwan tu namaka ¶i ńß…ô-maan a nisur~…ĺitan, nika mańßi ¶aaj kija ku r~…ĺabu, ańßi ¶an miadińß. ńß…ô-ma a nikaudipan ńßakija i kun-j…ôn nu ajawan tu sabaw tusa a s…ô ¶ian katukuńß i kunjun nuajawan tu pitu a s…ô ¶ian, nipir~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan nida a dijadu Ē~ °an, nir~…ĺiwanan nu sumamad ńßan tusa a sasur~…ĺitan, masakamutu pituaj a nijadu Ē~ °an, ńßakija nakamuan tu r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° nida itini tu i putuaj nu nijadu Ē~ °an. sipakajda i ¶udadan nu r~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺan atu nakamuan nu pi ¶id…ôkan, ¶i ńß…ô-ma ńßakija u siw-ja-si-ja nutipanaj a ji-aw-ni-ja tad…ômaw, sadikudaj kapatajan i aj- ¶in-ńßaj a ji-aw-s…ô-daw. idaw ku musakamuaj nu sumamadaj a misur~…ĺitaj nu tad…ômawan namaka pa-pi-r~…ĺun dak…ôpan ¶i ńß…ô-ma patajdan i si-r~…ĺa sa, ¶i " ńß…ô-ma" itida i si-r~…ĺa nasur~…ĺitan par~…ĺ " sapatawid tu tad…ômaw" ńßan ku nipikajsiaku. duma satu, ¶i ńß…ô-ma u tatajna sa, ńßakija ¶i " ńß…ô-ma" u masakaputaj nu misur~…ĺitaj a ŇčaŇčanan sa. tunikam…ônuan ni ńß…ô-ma, ¶a ¶aj nu sumamadaj nu mituktukaj a tad…ômaw, sakatusa nu sumamadaj a si-r~…ĺa tad…ômaw par~…ĺutat…ôŇčan tu nikam…ônu Ē~ °an, makajbar~…ĺu ¶u a makaadińß tu tuuda a ¶a a kakatin…ôŇčan. **, . nikaaar~…ĺawan tina ¶udadan, namaka sabaw tu pitu a s…ô ¶ian, mi ¶uji tu kina katuudaj nu tad…ômawan, tad…ômaw namaka ¶udad mar~…ĺiŇčatu tu masasuar~…ĺaw tu. tat…ôŇčan nikaaar~…ĺawan tina ¶udadan namaka sabaw tu war~…ĺu a s…ô ¶i nikuda, ¶ajpi ¶ war~…ĺwar~…ĺ mińß ¶aan kaadińßan a " ji-r~…ĺi-ja-ta Ē~ °" wi-ni-s…ô nar~…ĺimaan a nisur~…ĺitan a nisaŇčaan tu ńß…ô-ma a nisur~…ĺitan mar~…ĺa katuudaj nu tad…ômawan a nikaaar~…ĺawan, misuajaw tu dadadiwan nu nataŇčańßan a nipikinkiwan tada maaar~…ĺawtu ka pińßa ¶…ôŇč. . nu pajr~…ĺumar~…ĺumaan a niadińßan mar~…ĺatur~…ĺu, sipakajda i d…ô-kuo sj…ô ¶…ô ¶i wuo-…ô-ńßu dajńßu a " apujuaj dadiw nakamuan" saan nikar~…ĺiŇčatu nina ¶uda sipakajda i kunj…ôn nu ajawan sabaw tur~…ĺu a s…ô ¶i katukuńß i kunj…ôn siwa a s…ô ¶i nu ajawan, ¶aaj namin kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad ku misur~…ĺitaj a nataŇčańßan, u nakamuan sa anikar~…ĺajr~…ĺajan, nisakapańßan tu nisur~…ĺitan, madajumaj ni ńß…ô-ma, u ji-ta-r~…ĺi sj…ô- ¶…ô ¶i ¶…ôn-pa-di-s…ô-ta.wi-k…ô u dajńßu a " par~…ĺ…ô ¶ad nu nakamuan" saan ¶i ńß…ô-ma mi ¶ukajmas tu sumamadaj nu tad…ômawan a nir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺa nataŇčańßan misaŇča tu sapar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad a dadadiwan, "makajbar~…ĺu ¶uan a nakamuan" sakaj nina tusaaj a nidat…ôŇčan mar~…ĺatusa tu ku nabar~…ĺu ¶uan, saan ninatusaaj a ¶udadan mar~…ĺanuajawan ni ńß…ô-ma nataŇčaańß nisur~…ĺitan tu tusaaj a saka ¶aaj kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad a nisur~…ĺitan, sipakajda tu tawan anipisir~…ĺ…ôm…ôdan, ńßajmaw sa mar~…ĺatanajuaj a ¶udadan. sisa nina ¶uda idaw ku sapar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad a nisaŇčaan, idaw ku mańßi ¶aaj kija. . amir~…ĺika a sj…ô ¶…ô ¶i mi-…ô-man. pa-r~…ĺi sakamusa ¶i ńß…ô-ma ¶udadan u mańßiniaj nu dadiw…ôn midaŇčaj nu dadajdajan, satabakiaj a siwmian u ńß…ô-ma ¶uda idaw ku sananaj tu " ńß…ô-ma-s…ô-taw-ji". sakaj midaŇčaj mudadiwaj a sitaŇčańßaj nu tad…ômawan, idaw namin ku mańßidaaj a sasakamu…ôn, sasapur~…ĺuŇčan a kapańßaj, nu katańß…ôkar~…ĺan migiki. ¶i ńß…ô-ma ¶udad jadańß ku masańßi ¶aaj a kitidaan, tat…ôŇčan u kapańßaj nu kakajdińßan. .
S.FORM: == He-ma Ťć∑ť¶¨ == He-ma, nakamuan u sumamaday nu Si-la a ngaliwnguay nu micudaday a tademaw, pilecuhan i Ya-si-ya , mamenu', natangahan nida u Se-se "Yi-li-ya-te'" atu "Aw-de-say", nina tusaay pulung han pangangan "He-mi-se-se", ayda inai' ku simie tu sakay ci He-maan a nikaidawan nida, sisa idaw ku sananay ci nidaan u tengil nu sasakamuen mahida u nisangaan a tademaw. namakayda tu "He-ma-se-se" katuuday nu syece saan u tawyaay nikaydaaan nu pinaay a seci namaka laway nu nipakatineng a nicudadan a nisaicelangan. Ťć∑ť¶¨, . nikaudip atu nakamuan ÁĒüŚĻ≥ŚŹäŚā≥Ť™™ inai' tu ku sulitan ni He-lan, sisa yadah ku sasakamuen ci nidaan, nika inai' naming ku tatenaay. nipilecuhan atu dimiad caay katinengi, nisulitan tu demiadan caay tu ka tinengi. sakay nikaudip nida, sulit nu Ku-si-la sye-cia ci Si-luo-duo-de saan tu nikaudip ni He-ma itida i nikaudip nida a zitayan nu nuayawan caay pilakuuyt tu sepat a lasubu nu mihcaan, hakiya mikiayaw tu kunyen walu a lasubu lima a bataan nu mihcaan. uyniyan a nakamuan, idaw ku sananay ci He-maan a ziday caay pibatad tu Te'-luo-yi nikalepacawan, hakiya mikiayaw tu kunyen sabaw tusa a secian. ni He-ma a zitayan hakiya u kunyen nu ayawan a cacay nu bataan a secian. pilecuhan ni He-ma, idaw ku caayay kalecad nu nakamuan. naidaw ku pituay nu kitidaan atu cense masasualaw tu ci He-maan a kinlian. sayadahay a nakamuan namakayda i Yi-aw-ni-ya, daysa nida a cudad yadah ku namaka Yi-aw-ni-ya a nakamuan. . Ku-si-la tademaw sakay ci He-ma nicudadan palSi-la lalanagawan a sakapahay nu He-ma palabinacadan a kasenengan, nika ci Tin-ken saan ci He-maan u " misulitay a tapang". nika i sabaw tu pitu hedek a secian, hamaw sa pabaliw idaw haw kina ci He-ma a tademawsa, atu pilecuhan, nikaudipan, nicudadan nidaay hakiya sisangaan nida idaw ku caayay kalecad nu niadihan, mala " He-ma nu wendayan". ". i sumamad yadah ku liwan tu namaka ci He-maan a nisulitan, nika mahicaay kiya ku labu, ahican miadih. He-ma a nikaudipan hakiya i kun-yen nu ayawan tu sabaw tusa a secian katukuh i kunyun nuayawan tu pitu a secian, nipilecuhan nida a diyadu'an, niliwanan nu sumamad han tusa a sasulitan, masakamutu pituay a niyadu'an, hakiya nakamuan tu luma' nida itini tu i putuay nu niyadu'an. sipakayda i cudadan nu laculan atu nakamuan nu picidekan, ci He-ma hakiya u Siw-ya-si-ya nutipanay a Yi-aw-ni-ya tademaw, sadikuday kapatayan i Ay-cin-hay a Yi-aw-se-daw. idaw ku musakamuay nu sumamaday a misulitay nu tademawan namaka Pa-pi-lun dakepan ci He-ma pataydan i Si-la sa, ci " He-ma" itida i Si-la nasulitan pal " sapatawid tu tademaw" han ku nipikaysiaku. duma satu, ci He-ma u tatayna sa, hakiya ci " He-ma" u masakaputay nu misulitay a nganganan sa. tunikamenuan ni He-ma, cacay nu sumamaday nu mituktukay a tademaw, sakatusa nu sumamaday a Si-la tademaw palutatengan tu nikamenu'an, makaybalucu a makaadih tu tuuda aca a kakatinengan. ŚŹ¶Ś§Ė, . nikaaalawan tina cudadan, namaka sabaw tu pitu a secian, micuyi tu kina katuuday nu tademawan, tademaw namaka cudad malingatu tu masasualaw tu. tatengan nikaaalawan tina cudadan namaka sabaw tu walu a seci nikuda, caypic walwal mihcaan kaadihan a " Yi-li-ya-ta'" wi-ni-se nalimaan a nisulitan a nisangaan tu He-ma a nisulitan mala katuuday nu tademawan a nikaaalawan, misuayaw tu dadadiwan nu natangahan a nipikinkiwan tada maaalawtu ka pihaceng. . nu paylumalumaan a niadihan malatulu, sipakayda i De-kuo syece ci Wuo-e-hu dayhu a " apuyuay dadiw nakamuan" saan nikalingatu nina cuda sipakayda i kunyen nu ayawan sabaw tulu a seci katukuh i kunyen siwa a seci nu ayawan, caay namin kalecad ku misulitay a natangahan, u nakamuan sa anikalaylayan, nisakapahan tu nisulitan, madayumay ni He-ma, u Yi-ta-li sye-ce ci Cen-pa-di-se-ta.Wi-ke u dayhu a " palecad nu nakamuan" saan ci He-ma micukaymas tu sumamaday nu tademawan a nilacula natangahan misanga tu sapalecad a dadadiwan, "makaybalucuan a nakamuan" sakay nina tusaay a nidatengan malatusa tu ku nabalucuan, saan ninatusaay a cudadan malanuayawan ni He-ma natangaah nisulitan tu tusaay a sakacaay kalecad a nisulitan, sipakayda tu tawan anipisilemedan, haymaw sa malatanayuay a cudadan. sisa ninacuda idaw ku sapalecad a nisangaan, idaw ku mahicaay kiya. . Amilika a syece ci Mi-e-man. Pa-li sakamusa ci He-ma cudadan u mahiniay nu dadiwen midangay nu dadaydayan, satabakiay a siwmian u He-ma cuda idaw ku sananay tu " He-ma-se-taw-yi". sakay midangay mudadiway a sitangahay nu tademawan, idaw namin ku mahidaay a sasakamuen, sasapulungan a kapahay, nu katahekalan migiki. ci He-ma cudad yadah ku masahicaay a kitidaan, tatengan u kapahay nu kakaydihan. .

¶…ôr~…ĺaŇčan. **, . nikaudip atu nakamuan ***** inai Ē~ ° tu ku sur~…ĺitan ni ńß…ô-r~…ĺan, sisa jadańß ku sasakamu…ôn ¶i nidaan, nika inai Ē~ ° namiŇč ku tat…ônaaj. nipir~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan atu dimiad ¶aaj katin…ôŇči, nisur~…ĺitan tu d…ômiadan ¶aaj tu ka tin…ôŇči. sakaj nikaudip nida, sur~…ĺit nu ku-si-r~…ĺa sj…ô- ¶ia ¶i si-r~…ĺuo-duo-d…ô saan tu nikaudip ni ńß…ô-ma itida i nikaudip nida a zitajan nu nuajawan ¶aaj pir~…ĺakuujt tu s…ôpat a r~…ĺasubu nu mińß ¶aan, ńßakija mikiajaw tu kunj…ôn war~…ĺu a r~…ĺasubu r~…ĺima a bataan nu mińß ¶aan. ujnijan a nakamuan, idaw ku sananaj ¶i ńß…ô-maan a zidaj ¶aaj pibatad tu t…ô Ē~ °-r~…ĺuo-ji nikar~…ĺ…ôpa ¶awan, ńßakija mikiajaw tu kunj…ôn sabaw tusa a s…ô ¶ian. ni ńß…ô-ma a zitajan ńßakija u kunj…ôn nu ajawan a ¶a ¶aj nu bataan a s…ô ¶ian. pir~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan ni ńß…ô-ma, idaw ku ¶aajaj kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad nu nakamuan. naidaw ku pituaj nu kitidaan atu ¶…ôns…ô masasuar~…ĺaw tu ¶i ńß…ô-maan a kinr~…ĺian. sajadańßaj a nakamuan namakajda i ji-aw-ni-ja, dajsa nida a ¶udad jadańß ku namaka ji-aw-ni-ja a nakamuan. . ku-si-r~…ĺa tad…ômaw sakaj ¶i ńß…ô-ma ni ¶udadan par~…ĺsi-r~…ĺa r~…ĺar~…ĺanagawan a sakapańßaj nu ńß…ô-ma par~…ĺabina ¶adan a kas…ôn…ôŇčan, nika ¶i tin-k…ôn saan ¶i ńß…ô-maan u " misur~…ĺitaj a tapaŇč". nika i sabaw tu pitu ńß…ôd…ôk a s…ô ¶ian, ńßamaw sa pabar~…ĺiw idaw ńßaw kina ¶i ńß…ô-ma a tad…ômawsa, atu pir~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan, nikaudipan, ni ¶udadan nidaaj ńßakija sisaŇčaan nida idaw ku ¶aajaj kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad nu niadińßan, mar~…ĺa " ńß…ô-ma nu w…ôndajan". ". i sumamad jadańß ku r~…ĺiwan tu namaka ¶i ńß…ô-maan a nisur~…ĺitan, nika mańßi ¶aaj kija ku r~…ĺabu, ańßi ¶an miadińß. ńß…ô-ma a nikaudipan ńßakija i kun-j…ôn nu ajawan tu sabaw tusa a s…ô ¶ian katukuńß i kunjun nuajawan tu pitu a s…ô ¶ian, nipir~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan nida a dijadu Ē~ °an, nir~…ĺiwanan nu sumamad ńßan tusa a sasur~…ĺitan, masakamutu pituaj a nijadu Ē~ °an, ńßakija nakamuan tu r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° nida itini tu i putuaj nu nijadu Ē~ °an. sipakajda i ¶udadan nu r~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺan atu nakamuan nu pi ¶id…ôkan, ¶i ńß…ô-ma ńßakija u siw-ja-si-ja nutipanaj a ji-aw-ni-ja tad…ômaw, sadikudaj kapatajan i aj- ¶in-ńßaj a ji-aw-s…ô-daw. idaw ku musakamuaj nu sumamadaj a misur~…ĺitaj nu tad…ômawan namaka pa-pi-r~…ĺun dak…ôpan ¶i ńß…ô-ma patajdan i si-r~…ĺa sa, ¶i " ńß…ô-ma" itida i si-r~…ĺa nasur~…ĺitan par~…ĺ " sapatawid tu tad…ômaw" ńßan ku nipikajsiaku. duma satu, ¶i ńß…ô-ma u tatajna sa, ńßakija ¶i " ńß…ô-ma" u masakaputaj nu misur~…ĺitaj a ŇčaŇčanan sa. tunikam…ônuan ni ńß…ô-ma, ¶a ¶aj nu sumamadaj nu mituktukaj a tad…ômaw, sakatusa nu sumamadaj a si-r~…ĺa tad…ômaw par~…ĺutat…ôŇčan tu nikam…ônu Ē~ °an, makajbar~…ĺu ¶u a makaadińß tu tuuda a ¶a a kakatin…ôŇčan. **, . nikaaar~…ĺawan tina ¶udadan, namaka sabaw tu pitu a s…ô ¶ian, mi ¶uji tu kina katuudaj nu tad…ômawan, tad…ômaw namaka ¶udad mar~…ĺiŇčatu tu masasuar~…ĺaw tu. tat…ôŇčan nikaaar~…ĺawan tina ¶udadan namaka sabaw tu war~…ĺu a s…ô ¶i nikuda, ¶ajpi ¶ war~…ĺwar~…ĺ mińß ¶aan kaadińßan a " ji-r~…ĺi-ja-ta Ē~ °" wi-ni-s…ô nar~…ĺimaan a nisur~…ĺitan a nisaŇčaan tu ńß…ô-ma a nisur~…ĺitan mar~…ĺa katuudaj nu tad…ômawan a nikaaar~…ĺawan, misuajaw tu dadadiwan nu nataŇčańßan a nipikinkiwan tada maaar~…ĺawtu ka pińßa ¶…ôŇč. . nu pajr~…ĺumar~…ĺumaan a niadińßan mar~…ĺatur~…ĺu, sipakajda i d…ô-kuo sj…ô ¶…ô ¶i wuo-…ô-ńßu dajńßu a " apujuaj dadiw nakamuan" saan nikar~…ĺiŇčatu nina ¶uda sipakajda i kunj…ôn nu ajawan sabaw tur~…ĺu a s…ô ¶i katukuńß i kunj…ôn siwa a s…ô ¶i nu ajawan, ¶aaj namin kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad ku misur~…ĺitaj a nataŇčańßan, u nakamuan sa anikar~…ĺajr~…ĺajan, nisakapańßan tu nisur~…ĺitan, madajumaj ni ńß…ô-ma, u ji-ta-r~…ĺi sj…ô- ¶…ô ¶i ¶…ôn-pa-di-s…ô-ta.wi-k…ô u dajńßu a " par~…ĺ…ô ¶ad nu nakamuan" saan ¶i ńß…ô-ma mi ¶ukajmas tu sumamadaj nu tad…ômawan a nir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺa nataŇčańßan misaŇča tu sapar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad a dadadiwan, "makajbar~…ĺu ¶uan a nakamuan" sakaj nina tusaaj a nidat…ôŇčan mar~…ĺatusa tu ku nabar~…ĺu ¶uan, saan ninatusaaj a ¶udadan mar~…ĺanuajawan ni ńß…ô-ma nataŇčaańß nisur~…ĺitan tu tusaaj a saka ¶aaj kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad a nisur~…ĺitan, sipakajda tu tawan anipisir~…ĺ…ôm…ôdan, ńßajmaw sa mar~…ĺatanajuaj a ¶udadan. sisa nina ¶uda idaw ku sapar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad a nisaŇčaan, idaw ku mańßi ¶aaj kija. . amir~…ĺika a sj…ô ¶…ô ¶i mi-…ô-man. pa-r~…ĺi sakamusa ¶i ńß…ô-ma ¶udadan u mańßiniaj nu dadiw…ôn midaŇčaj nu dadajdajan, satabakiaj a siwmian u ńß…ô-ma ¶uda idaw ku sananaj tu " ńß…ô-ma-s…ô-taw-ji". sakaj midaŇčaj mudadiwaj a sitaŇčańßaj nu tad…ômawan, idaw namin ku mańßidaaj a sasakamu…ôn, sasapur~…ĺuŇčan a kapańßaj, nu katańß…ôkar~…ĺan migiki. ¶i ńß…ô-ma ¶udad jadańß ku masańßi ¶aaj a kitidaan, tat…ôŇčan u kapańßaj nu kakajdińßan. .
